item.title:
Finally, we’ve been talking to lots of users about helping them make the most of Claude Code.
We’ll...
item.description:
Finally, we’ve been talking to lots of users about helping them make the most of Claude Code.
We’ll be sharing more this week on that work, starting with our updates to /usage.
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 30 | 🔁 1 | 💬 3 | 👁 1464
item.author: @trq212

item.description:

You can sign up for that and our other our webinars here: https://t.co/lPeN5zkKvm
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 45 | 🔁 4 | 💬 2 | 👁 2143
item.author: @trq212

item.title: We’ve heard your feedback and we’re working on making it easier to follow everything that’s happenin...
item.description:
We’ve heard your feedback and we’re working on making it easier to follow everything that’s happening with Claude Code.
First, we’re introducing @ClaudeDevs, the official channel to follow for all updates on Claude Code and the Claude platform.
--- @trq212 | ❤️ 266 | 🔁 10 | 💬 31 | 👁 14567
item.author: @trq212

item.title:
Announcing GPT-Rosalind, our frontier model for life science research.
This model is a step towards...
item.description:
Announcing GPT-Rosalind, our frontier model for life science research.
This model is a step towards one of our most important goals — accelerating science and improving human outcomes.
Excited to work with many amazing partners on deploying and improving this model. https://t.co/JCKLTkOCJn
--- @gdb | ❤️ 208 | 🔁 19 | 💬 21 | 👁 10748
item.author: @gdb

item.title:
RT @VinceZcrikl: 这是Hermes也下场玩中转站了吗？还集成到了自家产品
不一样的是，一次订阅能除了300+模型还有第三方付费tool，各家抓网页、生图、语音月费从10到100刀
